description: Goal: make the fact engine model current evidence, dirty evidence, and settled evidence directly so compiler2 can do the minimum demanded work without pass-shaped freshness checks. Signal: engine-only scheduler tests prove that stable recompute can settle a fact without a content revision bump, settled waiters block on dirty facts, current readers can iterate, and multi-publisher facts settle only when every active publisher is clean. Strategy: repair the engine first, then convert semantic typing to use ActivationInputs and ReturnEvidence, then delete the manual freshness and fake unknown-as-type concepts. Outro: grep-level deletion contract proves ActivationKey.input body evidence, missing-return-as-none, unresolved-as-any, ReturnType-as-ready-Ty, DependencySnapshot freshness, and semantic_closure_is_current are gone rather than renamed.
title: Compiler2 fact readiness: current vs settled evidence
